scenario.name: query_b4_07_device_status
scenario.send:
MESSAGE sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=z9hG4bK[callId] From: <sip:34020000002000000001@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTagB407[callNumber] To: <sip:34020000001320000001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] MESSAGE Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: WVP-Test-Simulator-B407 Content-Type: Application/MANSCDP+xml Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <Query> <CmdType>DeviceStatusQuery</CmdType> <SN>1</SN> <DeviceID>34020000001320000001</DeviceID> </Query>

recv.action: <ereg regexp="CmdType>DeviceStatus<" search_in="body" assign_to="status_resp" /> <ereg regexp="Online>ON<" search_in="body" assign_to="online_val" /> <ereg regexp="Status>OK<" search_in="body" assign_to="status_val" /> <ereg regexp="CPU>[0-9]+<" search_in="body" assign_to="cpu_val" />
